title: Untitled Modpack For Forge
description: This modpack hopefully makes a fun experience while keeping it all simple. Mods like Origins and Better Combat allows creativity in your own play-style. Mods like Lootr and Simple Voice Chat allow multiplayer support. I hope you enjoy! <3
body:
Just a modpack I made to make a (hopefully) fun Minecraft experience!

The mods in this modpack will (again, hopefully) add enough content to your game to provide gameplay that's balanced in grinding, building and progressing. Hope you have fun!
